type.description: Required. The type of the payment action. Determines the action to be taken.

actionable_id.description: Optional. The ID of the associated actionable object.

actionable_type.description: Optional. The type of the associated actionable object. One of `payment_order`, `expected_payment`. Required if `actionable_id` is passed.

internal_account_id.description: Optional. The ID of one of your organization's internal accounts. Required if `actionable_id` is not passed.

details.description: Optional. The specifc details of the payment action based on type.
